Lumify
Table of Contents

Class FriendshipController

Namespace
lumify.api.Controllers
Assembly
lumify.api.dll

Manages friendships: sending, accepting and rejecting friend requests, removing friends, and listing incoming/outgoing requests and current friends. All endpoints require an authenticated user. Changes are pushed live to the affected user over the ChatHub so clients update without a reload.

[ApiController]
[Route("friendship/[action]")]
[Authorize]
public class FriendshipController : ControllerBase
Inheritance
object
ControllerBase
FriendshipController

Constructors

FriendshipController(ILogger<FriendshipController>, LumifyDbContext, FriendshipService, IPresenceService, IHubContext<ChatHub>)

Creates the controller with its injected dependencies (logging, database context, friendship service, presence service and the chat hub used for live notifications).

public FriendshipController(ILogger<FriendshipController> logger, LumifyDbContext db, FriendshipService friendshipService, IPresenceService presenceService, IHubContext<ChatHub> chatHub)

Parameters

logger ILogger<FriendshipController>
db LumifyDbContext
friendshipService FriendshipService
presenceService IPresenceService
chatHub IHubContext<ChatHub>

Methods

AcceptFriendRequest(string)

Accepts a pending friend request addressed to the current user.

[HttpPatch]
[ActionName("acceptFriendRequest")]
public Task<ActionResult> AcceptFriendRequest(string friendshipID)

Parameters

friendshipID string

The pending friendship to accept.

Returns

Task<ActionResult>

200 with Success = true; 400 if the ID is missing or the request cannot be accepted (e.g. not addressed to the current user).

GetFriendsOfUser(CancellationToken)

Returns the current user's accepted friends, each enriched with its live presence status (online/away/offline) from the presence service.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getFriendsOfUser")]
public Task<ActionResult<List<UserPreviewResponse>>> GetFriendsOfUser(CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<List<UserPreviewResponse>>>

200 with the list of friends; 401 if no user is logged in.

GetIncomingFriendRequests(CancellationToken)

Returns the pending friend requests addressed to the current user, newest first, including the requester's username, display name and avatar.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getIncomingFriendRequests")]
public Task<ActionResult<List<FriendshipResponse>>> GetIncomingFriendRequests(CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<List<FriendshipResponse>>>

200 with the list of incoming requests; 401 if no user is logged in.

GetOutgoingFriendRequests(CancellationToken)

Returns the pending friend requests sent by the current user, newest first, including the addressee's username, display name and avatar.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getOutgoingFriendRequests")]
public Task<ActionResult<List<FriendshipResponse>>> GetOutgoingFriendRequests(CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<List<FriendshipResponse>>>

200 with the list of outgoing requests; 401 if no user is logged in.

RejectFriendRequest(string)

Rejects a pending friend request addressed to the current user.

[HttpPatch]
[ActionName("rejectFriendRequest")]
public Task<ActionResult> RejectFriendRequest(string friendshipID)

Parameters

friendshipID string

The pending friendship to reject.

Returns

Task<ActionResult>

200 with Success = true; 400 if the ID is missing or the request cannot be rejected.

RemoveFriend(string)

Removes an existing friendship between the current user and another user.

[HttpPatch]
[ActionName("removeFriend")]
public Task<ActionResult> RemoveFriend(string friendID)

Parameters

friendID string

The friend to remove.

Returns

Task<ActionResult>

200 with Success = true; 400 if the ID is missing or the friendship cannot be removed.

SendFriendRequest(string)

Sends a friend request from the current user to another user.

[HttpPost]
[ActionName("sendFriendRequest")]
public Task<ActionResult> SendFriendRequest(string addresseeID)

Parameters

addresseeID string

The user who should receive the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult>

200 with Success = true; 400 if the ID is missing or the request is rejected by the friendship service (e.g. already friends or pending).
